articles.title: Apple iPhone Fold Might Have A Sun Glare Problem - Wccftech
articles.description: Given the already high reflectance of iPhone displays, Apple's use of a CoE filter on the iPhone Fold can lead to a sun glare problem.
articles.content: Apple's iPhone Fold appears all set to incorporate a range of new display-related technologies for its internal screen, which is expected to be quite thin, energy-efficient, and sport a crease-free l… [+1716 chars]
